$comment: Single source of truth for the OAuth redirect URIs that MUST be registered in the Google + Apple consoles for Clerk sign-in to work. Derived from each Clerk instance's FAPI host (decode the publishable key with decodeFapiHostFromPublishableKey). The console redirect_uri Clerk hands to Google/Apple is https://<fapi-host>/v1/oauth_callback. If a fapi host below changes, the Google/Apple consoles MUST be re-synced via the /auth-console-sync skill BEFORE shipping, or production sign-in breaks with redirect_uri_mismatch. Consumed by scripts/auth-redirect-uris.ts, apps/web/tests/unit/auth/fapi-host-snapshot.test.ts, and .claude/skills/auth-console-sync.

native.$comment: Clerk-side allowlist (auth.redirect_urls / native applications), NOT a Google/Apple console setting. Apple App ID ie.jov.Jovie carries the Sign in with Apple capability; the iOS native flow completes back into the app at this scheme.
